text: Duality of Human Nature Human Physical Need Wants and Limits Absolute Standard of Need: Inwardly Identified & Limited: need of the individual defined the desired g/s are identified by Individual Being ===> in terms of the g/s absolutely ===> the individual who looks inward required for that individual's to himself/herself subject to survival and minimal wellbeing reasonable physiological limits Relative Standard of Need: Outwardly Identified & Limited: need of the individual defined the desired g/s are identified by Social Being ===> relative to the g/s that others ===> the individual who looks outward in society especially neighbors to family, friends, and others who commonly possess and consume at once define what is desirable and impose limits on the individual’s freedom of choice
